name: CROWN CRAFTS INC
summary: Crown Crafts, Inc. is a consumer products company focused on infant and toddler products. The company designs, markets, and distributes products such as blankets, bibs, toys, and other infant accessories. Products are sold under licensed and proprietary brands through major retail channels. The filing does not provide extensive product detail in the extracted section.
